meta_title: For Freelancers: portfolio building to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to portfolio building and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Portfolio Building to Solve Debugging Woes
content.seo_description: Struggling to debug your code? Learn how to leverage portfolio building with Antigravity and Claude Code to speed up development and impress your clients.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting syntax errors and start architecting solutions. By shifting your focus from manual debugging to automated portfolio building, you leverage AI-driven scaffolding to handle the heavy lifting. Use Antigravity to structure your logic and Claude Code to execute and refine the implementation, ensuring high-quality, bug-free deliverables for every client.
content.intro:
The screen glows with a sea of red error logs, and the deadline is looming. You aren't just stuck; you're bleeding billable hours on trivial syntax issues that shouldn't exist in 2024. This isn't a failure of skill; it's a failure of workflow. When you stop treating every project as a blank slate and start treating your code as a reusable, modular portfolio, you transform from a struggling coder into an elite builder.

By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for real-time iterative fixes, you can bypass the 'debug loop' entirely. This guide strips away the fluff, showing you how to build robust, scalable applications that work the first time, allowing you to focus on high-value client features rather than chasing missing semicolons.

steps.title: Define the Architectural Blueprint
steps.description: Before writing code, define your project structure to prevent common debugging pitfalls later.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a modular project architecture for a SaaS landing page using Next.js, focusing on clean separation of concerns and error-resistant component trees.

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Use AI to scaffold the project so you never start from zero, reducing initial configuration errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the core authentication and database connection modules using Supabase, ensuring type safety and robust error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate auth middleware and db client'

steps.title: Implement Self-Healing Logic
steps.description: Inject error boundaries and logging wrappers into your base components to catch bugs before they crash the UI.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a high-order component (HOC) for error boundaries that logs failures to an external service and displays a user-friendly fallback state.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply error boundary to all components in /src/components'

steps.title: Execute Iterative Refinement
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform dry runs and unit tests on the generated modules to ensure functionality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project for circular dependencies and suggest performance optimizations for the API routes.

steps.title: Package for Portfolio Deployment
steps.description: Finalize the build and document the architecture for your portfolio, demonstrating professional coding standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a README.md that highlights the architectural choices, the error handling strategy, and the scalability of this project.

pro_tips: Always treat your client projects as 'open source' quality; clean code today prevents 'technical debt' support calls tomorrow.
Use Claude Code's `--watch` flag during development to catch regressions the moment they are introduced.
Maintain a 'snippets library' in Antigravity to reuse successful logic across different freelance contracts.
Prioritize Type-Safety over speed; let the compiler do the debugging for you so you don't have to.
Document your architectural decisions in the code comments; it makes you look like a senior architect to your clients.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully built your first project, deploy it to Vercel or Netlify and add the link to your public portfolio. Use your new workflow to tackle a larger, more complex feature set in your next client contract.
content.conversion_block: Stop getting stuck and start shipping high-value, professional-grade code that makes your clients return for more. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
